title: Always-On Wake Word Battery Drain

title: LLM DVFS and Static Power Wall
scenario: Running a 4GB mobile LLM at max memory frequency (50GB/s bandwidth) draws 4W dynamic power for RAM and 1W static system power, taking 80ms per token. title: Super-Res NPU vs 5G Streaming Energy
scenario: A mobile app plays a 2-hour 4K movie. Option A: Stream native 4K. The 5G radio draws 3.0W for 4K bandwidth, and the hardware decoder draws 0.9W. title: Thermal Throttling in Background Indexing
scenario: A smartphone indexes local photos using a Vision Transformer. The SoC has a 2.5W continuous TDP. The ViT runs at 30 FPS, consuming 4.0W (burst mode).
